JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-26-2002 AT 9:35 AM IN DEPT. 624, ANNE E. BOULIANE. NO APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT, SENT FOR PROVE-UP.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BACKLUND, DUANE
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOSEWIC, JOHN J SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-26-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-21-2002 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 218

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-26-2002 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON AUG-26-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; P. DIAS, CLERK; LETICIA PEREZ, REPORTER.

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-26-2002 IN DEPT. 624 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF COUNSEL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PROVE-UP HEARING HELD. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. HAVING HEARD THE EVIDENCE, THE COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF JOHN J. KOSEWIC TO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUANE BACKLUND, THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES SITUATED AT 607A & 609A HAIGHT ST., SAN FRANCISCO, CA. IT WAS FURTHER ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE SUM OF $6,250.00 BACK RENT, $1,040.00 UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES FOR A TOTAL SUM OF $7,290.00, COSTS AND $40.00 PER DIEM HOLDOVER. LEASE FORFEITED. EXHIBITS RETURNED. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE BOULIANE; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: D. LUBIN, #3234 (624)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOSEWIC, JOHN J AS TO DEFENDANT BACKLUND, DUANE DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BACKLUND, DUANE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BACKLUND, DUANE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOSEWIC, JOHN J

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-21-2002 - NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. MATTER TAKEN OFF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR. DEMAND FOR JURY TRIAL STRICKEN. REMAINS ON THE TRIAL CALENDAR. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; P. DIAS, CLERK; LETICIA PEREZ, REPORTER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOSEWIC, JOHN J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BACKLUND, DUANE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 607A & 609A HAIGHT ST., S.F., CA. $7,290.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,290.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COST PER COST BILL AND $40.00 PER DIEM HOLDOVER. SEE SCANNED DOC
